content: Phase 1 POC: Download + unzip source bundle, extract text from all PDFs/MDs, hash inventory, 1 LLM structured summary call
Phase 2: Backend — ingestion pipeline, classification, contradiction detection, artifact generation, APIs
Phase 2: Frontend — Source Lock Console (Dashboard, Source Index, Detail, Contradictions, Artifacts, Report, Accept)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
